none.justification: Correctly flags that src/utils/list.c does not exist, gives the struct definition with next/prev, and redirects to list.h with all 6 inline functions plus the relevant iteration/access macros.

ccodegraph.justification: Fully matches the GT: explicitly notes the nonexistent list.c, provides the correct struct, lists all 6 inline functions, and includes the macro helpers including first/last and for_each variants.

lsp.justification: Fully correct per the rubric: identifies the header-only implementation and missing list.c, gives the correct struct definition, and enumerates all inline functions and relevant macros. The extra clangd diagnostic note is irrelevant but not harmful.
